generated_oml:
instance AECOBuildingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical building or infrastructure asset in the Architecture, Engineering, Construction, and Operations (AECO) domain, featuring structural, mechanical, and operational components that require integration of static models and real-time data for simulation, analysis, and optimization across its entire lifecycle from design to operations."
    base:contains BuildingSensor
]

instance BuildingSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "BIM-enriched sensor device definitions in the physical building"
    DTDFVocab:producedData BuildingSensorData
]

instance BuildingSensorData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom BuildingSensor
]

instance RealTimeSensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time operational data streams from sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData BuildingSensorData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RealTimeMonitoringEnabler
]

instance BIMGeometricModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Geometric model based on BIM for spatial representation of the building"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler
]

instance BuildingControlBehavioralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Behavioral model defined through control logic by Building Control Engineers"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ControlEnabler
]

instance CustomAnalyticalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical models via custom services integrated through modular extension points"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AnalyticsEnabler
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) for automated generation of DT artifacts from enriched BIM models"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService, AnalysisService, OptimizationService
]

instance ControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for behavioral control logic models"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance AnalyticsEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for custom analytical models"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveAnalyticsService, OptimizationService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for real-time data exchange and synchronization"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation service for building performance analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]

instance AnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Analysis service for structural and mechanical systems"
    DTDFVocab:provides AnalysisInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization service for energy efficiency and resource allocation"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizationInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring service for facility management"
    DTDFVocab:provides MonitoringInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics service for maintenance and failure prediction"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveInsight
]

instance DecisionSupportService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Decision-making support service for AECO stakeholders"
    DTDFVocab:provides DecisionInsight
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization service for immersive monitoring and operation"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights from simulation of building performance"
]

instance AnalysisInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights from analysis of structural and mechanical systems"
]

instance OptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights from optimization of energy and resource usage"
]

instance MonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring insights for facility management"
]

instance PredictiveInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive insights for maintenance and operational failures"
]

instance DecisionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Decision-making support insights for AECO stakeholders"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Immersive visualization interface for Facility Managers to monitor system states"
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin lifecycle encompasses initial BIM-based device modeling (where Building Control Engineers define sensors, actuators, and controllers), followed by Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) transformation to structured representations and deployable artifacts. Operational phases include real-time data synchronization, interactive visualization for monitoring and control, and integration of custom services via standardized extension points. Governance is role-based, with Building Control Engineers handling initial modeling, Facility Managers overseeing real-time operations, and DT Engineers managing service extensions to ensure seamless transitions between development and operational stages."
]
